description: A vertical designed graphic split into two zones. The top half is a light powder-blue panel carrying a large bold dark-blue sans-serif headline: 'USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens'. The bottom half is a stock photograph showing a person's hand interacting with a futuristic translucent holographic interface labeled 'Analytics Dashboard' and 'Business Analytics', covered in bar charts, line graphs, pie charts, and figures (e.g. 'Sales', 'Purchased', 'Total Earning', percentages like 65%, 25%, 50%) - evoking big-data and AI-driven analysis. Overlaid on the lower-left is the standard solid-blue box with white serif text 'Making America Safe Again'. The visual style is clean corporate-tech, projecting a high-tech, data-driven enforcement capability. The propaganda technique uses imagery of advanced analytics dashboards to frame USCIS-ICE data sharing as a sophisticated tool for hunting 'criminal aliens', targeting the general public to convey competence and toughness. Designed agency graphic.
notable_text: USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens. Making America Safe Again. Analytics Dashboard.
